title: Ars (disambiguation)
content:
'''Ars''' was a name shared by three individuals and a freighter:

==Canon==
*'''[[Ars Dangor]]''', an advisor to [[Emperor]] [[Darth Sidious|Palpatine]].

==Legends==
*'''[[Ars Dangor/Legends|Ars Dangor]]''', an advisor to [[Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]].
*'''[[Ars Fivvle]]''', an [[Ugnaught/Legends|Ugnaught]] [[Journalist/Legends|journalist]].
*'''[[Ars Veruna/Legends|Ars Veruna]]''', former king of [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]].
*'''''[[Ars Opus]]''''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighter]].
{{Disambig}}
